case_title: HAROLD H. WONG VS. KEN CHAN

docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/8/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY WONG, HAROLD H. AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, KEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINITFF HAROLD WONG IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEN CHAN IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SENT A LETTER TO THE COURT STATING THAT HE HAD BEEN PAID IN FULL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 SERVED JUL-22-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, KEN
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
